LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT NITELIFE EXPRESS INC. DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITH TEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THIRD, FOURTH, AND FIFTH CAUSES OF ACTION. PLAINTIFF TO CLEARLY ALLEGE WHERE DEFENDANT'S DUTY DERIVES FROM FOR NEGLIGENCE, ALLEGE A STATUTORY VIOLATION FOR THE FOURTH CAUSE OF ACTION, AND ALLEGE THE TYPE OF CONTACT AND PERFORMANCE FOR FIFTH CAUSE OF ACTION. DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE EIGHTH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR ATTORNEY'S FEES WHICH IS NOT A CAUSE OF ACTION BUT A FORM OF RELIEF. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-23-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT NITELIFE EXPRESS INC. DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Appearances: Michael C. Kirrane, Esq. of LeClairRyan LLP (415) 913-4917 appearing for Defendant and moving party; Ivan W. Golde, Esq. Attorney at Law, (510) 530-3294 appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: The demurrer is overruled as to the third cause of action (negligence) and sustained as to the fourth and fifth causes of action with ten days leave to amend to give plaintiffs one final opportunity, if they are able, to allege the specific statutory duties alleged violated and the elements of a contract claim. Defense counsel is to prepare Order. (302/HEK)Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR # 5797

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-07-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT NITELIFE EXPRESS INC. DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer sustained with ten days leave to amend as to third, fourth, and fifth causes of action. Plaintiff to clearly allege where defendant's duty derives from for negligence, allege a statutory violation for the fourth cause of action, and allege the type of contact and performance for fifth cause of action. Demurrer sustained without leave to amend as to the eighth cause of action for attorney's fees which is not a cause of action but a form of relief. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
